steps.title: Set up the linear equation for total cost
steps.content:
The total cost equals the enrollment fee plus the monthly fee times the number of months. If $m$ is the number of months:
$$32 + 19m = 203$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of months
steps.content:
Subtract 32 from both sides:
$$19m = 171$$
Divide both sides by 19:
$$m = \frac{171}{19} = 9$$
That matches Choice C — $9$.
